content: agent2: implementing 'backup' + 'backup_suffix' params for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py to auto-backup existing files before overwrite. Also touching Tests/test_image.py. Will check for overlaps.

agent2: I've added 'backup'/'backup_suffix' params to Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py, around line 2554-2580 (right after save_all = params.pop(...) and before the created/open_fp block). I pop them from params before encoderinfo is built. When you add dry_run, please pop it similarly and place your logic so it doesn't clobber mine - happy to merge, just flagging the exact lines so we don't clash. I'll be merging your branch (team/agent1) before final patch.
agent2: merged your dry_run changes cleanly, no conflicts remained after resolving the docstring/pop-lines overlap in save(). All 198 tests pass. patch.txt pushed with both features combined.
